name: New Platform Request

## Platform Name

<!-- What platform are you requesting support for? -->

## Platform Documentation

<!-- Link to the platform's documentation on custom agents, rules, or skills. -->

## How Does This Platform Handle Custom Agents?

<!-- Brief technical description: what file format does it use? YAML frontmatter? 
TOML? Where do agent files live? What fields does it support (description, tools, 
permissions, etc.)? -->

## How Does It Handle Parallel Subagent Execution?

<!-- Does this platform support spawning multiple agents simultaneously? If so, 
how is that triggered? If not, how does it handle sequential agent delegation? -->

## How Does It Handle Reference/Template Files?

<!-- Does it have a concept of "reference documents" that agents can read but that 
aren't injected into every prompt? Where would templates live? -->

## Closest Existing Platform

<!-- Which of the existing platforms (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, 
Windsurf) is this most similar to structurally? -->

## Are You Willing to Build This?

- [ ] Yes, I can build this and open a PR
- [ ] I can help test it but need someone else to build it
- [ ] I am just making the request
